page_metadata.biotools__summary: miRTarBase database contains miRNA-target interactions (MTIs). The collected MTIs are validated experimentally by reporter assays, western blot, or microarray experiments with overexpression or knockdown of miRNAs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: miRTarBase database contains miRNA-target interactions (MTIs). The collected MTIs are validated experimentally by reporter assays, western blot, or microarray experiments with overexpression or knockdown of miRNAs.
